announcements.title: 🔥 Welcome to the New Semester!
announcements.content: We are super excited to kick off this year with amazing events. Stay tuned!

announcements.title: 💻 Hackathon Registration Open
announcements.content: Form your teams! The annual Campus Hackathon is back. Prizes up to $1000.

events.title: Flutter UI/UX Masterclass
events.description: Learn how to build beautiful and responsive mobile applications using Flutter and Dart. We built a complete app from scratch!

events.title: Spring Welcome Mixer
events.description: A great networking event to kick off the spring semester. Pizza, games, and meeting new club members.

events.title: AWS & NoSQL Databases Workshop
events.description: Dive deep into cloud computing. We'll cover DynamoDB and how to integrate it securely into your web applications.

events.title: AI Image Generation Hackathon
events.description: Compete with other teams to build the best AI-powered image generation tool using the latest APIs. Prizes included!
